nasb.text: The land which I gave to Abraham and Isaac, I will give it to you, And I will give the land to your descendants after you.”

esv.text: The land that I gave to Abraham and Isaac I will give to you, and I will give the land to your offspring after you.”

cnv.text: 我賜給亞伯拉罕和以撒的地， 我要賜給你， 我也要把這地賜給你的後裔。”

ccb.text: 我要把赐给亚伯拉罕和以撒的土地赐给你和你的后代。”

csbs.text: 我所赐给亚伯拉罕和以撒的地，我必赐给你； 我也要把这地赐给你的后裔。”
